continuumlexicon-desc: Structured lexicon storage and query interface for conlangs.
right-continuumlexicon-edit: Create, edit, and delete lexicon entries
continuumlexicon-noresults: No lexicon entries matched your filters.
continuumlexicon-import-denied: You do not have permission to import lexicon entries.
continuumlexicon-invalid-payload: Invalid payload. Expected a JSON object with an 'entries' array.
continuumlanguages-summary: Create, update, and organize languages used by the Continuum lexicon.
continuumlanguages-key-help: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
continuumlanguages-key-invalid: Language keys must use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.
continuumlanguages-key-duplicate: That language key is already in use.
continuumlanguages-parent-invalid: The selected parent language could not be found.
continuumlanguages-parent-self: A language cannot be its own parent.
continuumlanguages-noresults: No languages have been created yet.
continuumlanguages-missing: The requested language could not be found.
continuumlexiconedit-summary: Create, edit, delete, and filter lexicon entries from the wiki UI.
continuumlexiconedit-noentries: No lexicon entries matched the current filters.
continuumlexiconedit-language-required: Select a language before saving the entry.
continuumlexiconedit-language-invalid: The selected language could not be found.
continuumlexiconedit-parent-invalid: The selected parent entry could not be found.
continuumlexiconedit-parent-self: An entry cannot be its own parent.
continuumlexiconedit-no-languages: No languages exist yet. Create one on [[Special:Languages]] before adding new lexicon entries.
continuumlexiconedit-legacy-language: This legacy entry still uses the old free-text language value: $1
continuumlexiconedit-missing: The requested lexicon entry could not be found.
